# Reviews HDP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: dpr-669-wwz.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://www.stayforlong.com/hotel/es/hotel-delfin_tossa-de-mar
2. Click on 1.124 Comentarios
3. Wait 5 seconds
4. Click read-all-reviews-button
5. Click guest comments icon
6. Click Mostrar más button
7. Click Servicios icon
